caption: A person holds a transparent protective case containing a sports card, displaying it close to the camera. In the background, a man wearing a dark blue t-shirt sits behind a desk equipped with a computer monitor and various equipment. The setting is branded with the logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" appearing prominently as on-screen overlays. A colorful table surface featuring blue and green palm tree patterns is visible beneath the items. As the sequence progresses, the person holding the card shifts their grip and angles the protective case, causing reflections and light to dance across the plastic surface. The man in the background remains seated, observing the process. The focus remains tightly on the card being presented, while the branded text and the person in the background provide the context of a professional card-breaking environment.
